Description: DM Label Printer customer-pairing Lambda (Function URL). Two handlers in one bundle: pairing-codes (device-side) and pairing-claim (web-side).

LambdaFunctionName.Description: Name of the Lambda function being deployed (lambda-upload sets this per function).

S3Bucket.Description: Bucket used with CloudFormation to update function code.

S3Key.Description: Key to s3 object used with CloudFormation to update function code.

Role.Description: Execution role for the Lambda function.

CloudBearerToken.Description: Bearer token accepted by the device-side Function URL (codes endpoint). Empty string disables bearer auth.

DevicesTableName.Description: Name of the existing DMLabelPrinterCloudDevices DynamoDB table (PK DeviceCode, eu-west-1).

PairingCodesTableName.Description: Name of the existing DMLabelPrinterCloudPairingCodes DynamoDB table (PK Code, TTL on ExpiresAtUtc, eu-west-1).

CustomerTokensTableName.Description: Name of the existing DMLabelPrinterCloudCustomerTokens DynamoDB table (PK TokenHash, eu-west-1).

Lambda.Description: Name of the newly created Lambda function
